name: ruby-nfqueue
title: ruby-nfqueue
description:
Wrapper around libnetfilter_queue using FFI
This package contains a tiny wrapper around libnetfilter_queue. It allows you
to very simply intercept and modify network traffic in a Ruby environment.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-nfqueue because Wrapper around libnetfilter_queue using FFI.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-nfqueue as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-nfqueue with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-nfqueue --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
